title: Dangerous Days
writer: Mary Roberts Rinehart, Charles Kenyon, J.G. Hawks
actors: Lawson Butt, Clarissa Selwynne, Rowland V. Lee
plot: Rudolph Klein, a German spy, tries to persuade his brother Herman, a trusted employee of the Spencer Steel Works, to blow up the munitions factory. When World War I breaks out, Spencer's son Graham decides to enlist in the army, b...
